title: Fix admin panel access and functionality

requirements.text: Debug and fix the backend isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner with principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-547l3-aae', ensuring it returns true when this principal makes an admin check call
acceptanceCriteria: The isCallerAdmin method returns true when called by principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-547l3-aae'
The admin HashMap is correctly initialized with the owner principal
Backend logs confirm successful principal comparison

requirements.text: Verify the admin principals HashMap initialization in backend/main.mo correctly stores the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-547l3-aae' during actor initialization, using the correct Principal format for HashMap storage and retrieval
acceptanceCriteria: The adminPrincipals HashMap contains the owner principal after initialization
HashMap.get() correctly retrieves the stored owner principal
Principal comparison logic uses the correct equality check

requirements.text: Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method to output the caller's principal in text format using Principal.toText(), the HashMap lookup result, and whether the principal exists in the admin set, helping diagnose why authentication is failing
acceptanceCriteria: Logs display caller principal as text
Logs indicate whether admin check passed or failed with reason

requirements.text: Verify the frontend admin route protection in App.tsx correctly processes the isCallerAdmin response and displays the AdminPanel component when the backend returns true for the authenticated owner
acceptanceCriteria: Admin route displays AdminPanel when isOwner is true
No infinite loading states occur during permission check
Access denied message only shows when backend explicitly returns false

requirements.text: Verify the useIsOwner hook in frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts correctly calls the backend isCallerAdmin method and processes the boolean response without type coercion errors, ensuring true values remain true
acceptanceCriteria: Boolean response is not converted or misinterpreted
Console logs show exact boolean value and type from backend

constraints: The owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-547l3-aae' must be hardcoded in the backend for admin authentication
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Use the existing adminPrincipals HashMap for admin storage
nonGoals: Creating a new admin management system with multiple admins
Adding new admin panel features beyond fixing authentication
Modifying the Internet Identity authentication flow
